abort.wrong_hub: The provided credentials belong to a different hub than the one being re-authenticated.

error.multiple_devices_found: Found more than one device on this hub. This is not yet supported.

data_description.activation_code: The one-time activation code shown when adding a new user in the B&D Smart Garage Access app.
data_description.user_password: The password shown for the new user in the B&D Smart Garage Access app - it's assigned automatically, not one you choose.

reauth_confirm.description: Re-pair with your B&D SmartDoorDevices hub. In the B&D Smart Garage Access app, go to Settings → Users → your hub → Add new user, then note the activation code and password it shows you.

data_description.activation_code: The one-time activation code shown when adding a new user in the B&D Smart Garage Access app.
data_description.host: The LAN IP address of your B&D hub (Basestation). Check your router's DHCP client list.
data_description.user_password: The password shown for the new user in the B&D Smart Garage Access app - it's assigned automatically, not one you choose.

user.description: Pair a new phone with your B&D SmartDoorDevices hub. In the B&D Smart Garage Access app, go to Settings → Users → your hub → Add new user, then note the activation code and password it shows you.
